skills.name: Abyssal Echoes
skills.description: A nova that echoes from up to 8 enemies it reaches and applies abyssal decay. Enemies with abyssal decay take void damage over time for 5 seconds, if they take a hit all the damage from abyssal decay is dealt to them immediately.
skills.altText:
Abyssal decay deals a total of 100 void damage over its duration, with added spell damage applied at 100% effectiveness each second.

Abyssal Echoes cannot apply other on hit effects on hit.

skills.name: Acid Flask
skills.description: Throw a flask of acid that explodes dealing physical damage on impact, poisoning enemies and reducing their armor.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

skills.name: Aerial Assault
skills.description: You leap towards the target and your {Falcon} dives to catch you and momentarily carry you further, before it flies up and unleashes a {Wing Burst} at the target location.
skills.altText: The Wing Burst deals physical throwing damage and scales with your Falcon's stats.

skills.name: Anomaly
skills.description: Combo skill that first sends enemies forward in time by 5 seconds. Reactivate the skill to bring those enemies back to your timeline early.
skills.altText: Bosses are only sent forward by a millisecond, causing return effects to occur immediately without them visually disappearing.

skills.name: Anomaly
skills.description: Brings enemies that were sent forward back to your time.

skills.name: Armblade Slash
skills.description: Slash enemies in front of you with a fast combo ability.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

skills.name: Armblade Slash
skills.description: Slash enemies in front of you with a fast combo ability.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

skills.name: Assemble Abomination
skills.description:
Hold ability key to channel to absorb your Wraiths, Summoned Skeletons, Skeletal Mages, Golems, and Volatile Zombies in an area. When you release, summon a single hulking abomination with added health and more damage per minion absorbed.

The abomination remembers the minions absorbed to create it and will rapidly devour those minions to restore 10% of its maximum health.
skills.altText:
Abomination gains health equal to the max health of minions consumed and 5% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per minion consumed (up to 20 minions).
All minions of the same type are devoured if any one of them are absorbed. For example, Skeleton Warriors, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Archers are the same type of Summoned Skeleton.

skills.name: Aura Of Decay
skills.description:
Toggles Aura of Decay, which poisons you every second, and leaves a trail of decay. Enemies near you or in the trail are poisoned four times a second, and your chance to poison on hit applies to each of these instances at 100% effectiveness.

While Aura of Decay is active you take 30% less poison damage. Additionally, you take 50% less damage from your own Aura of Decay.
skills.altText: Your chance to poison on hit does not increase the rate at which poison is applied to you.

skills.name: Avalanche
skills.description: Summon the might of winter and pummel your foes in ice and snow, unleashing a large boulder at the target followed by 10 smaller boulders around the area over 2 seconds.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness. Each hit has a freeze rate of 80.
The large boulder deals 100% more damage and has 100% more area of effect (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

Increased Area for Area Skills stats apply to the area of the individual boulders, but not to the area in which they fall.

skills.name: Ballista
skills.description: Summons a ballista that fires bolts at nearby enemies.
skills.altText: Ballistae have 1000 base health and last 10 seconds by default. Enemies rarely target ballistas.

skills.name: Banner Rush
skills.description: Dash to your Banner. Cannot be used without a target.
skills.altText: Shares a cooldown with Lunge and Shield Rush.

skills.name: Bone Curse
skills.description: Apply a curse to enemies in an area for 8 seconds that causes physical damage when hit. The damage is tripled if you inflicted the hit yourself.
skills.altText:
Added spell damage applies at 20% effectiveness to each hit.

When the curse deals damage it counts as an additional hit, but cannot apply ailments from effects such as "chance to ignite on hit".

skills.name: Chaos Bolts
skills.description: A barrage of chaotic projectiles which land in an area around the target. The explosions deal necrotic and fire damage in a small area.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness for each bolt.

skills.name: Chthonic Fissure
skills.description:
Opens an infernal fissure in the ground, dealing fire damage over time to enemies on top of it, as well as releasing {Spirits} from the fissure that seek nearby enemies. These spirits inflict enemies with {Torment}, a {Curse} that slows and deals necrotic damage over time.

Max 1 active fissure.
skills.altText:
Added damage for the {Fissure} applies at 120% effectiveness each second.

Added damage for the {Spirits} applies at 30% effectiveness.

{Torment} applies 18% less movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), deals 120 damage over 3 seconds and added damage applies at 200% effectiveness per second.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText: The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Cinder Strike
skills.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Create Shadow
skills.description:
Create a Shadow of yourself that persists for up to 5 seconds and will imitate your next Shadow Cascade, Shurikens, Umbral Blades, or Acid Flask.
Up to 3 Shadows can be active at once.

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dancing Strikes
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

skills.name: Dark Quiver
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Summons 7 Black Arrows that rain from the sky over 4 seconds, granting 100% increased damage to your next bow attack when retrieved.
skills.altText: You can hold up to 3 Black Arrows at once, but can only expend one at a time.

skills.name: Death Seal
skills.description:
Toggle to seal your health, preventing it from going above its current value for 3 seconds. While sealed you take less damage equal to half your percent missing health, and 90% of hit damage taken is dealt over 4 seconds. 

Reactivate to unleash a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been active and your current percent missing health.
skills.altText:
The Wave of Death deals up to 20% more damage per second Death Seal has been active and deal 1% more damage per 1% missing health. Both effects are multiplicative with other modifiers.

Added spell damage applies at 500% effectiveness to Wave of Death.

Hit damage that is dealt over 4 seconds cannot be altered after the hit and is unaffected by temporary immunity effects. It does not count as damage over time.

skills.name: Death Seal
skills.description: Releases a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been actve and your current percent missing health.

skills.name: Decoy
skills.description: Throw a device to create a Decoy that taunts enemies around it for 2.5 seconds before exploding.
skills.altText:
Added throwing attack damage is applied at 600% effectiveness to the explosion.

The Decoy cannot be destroyed before it expires.

skills.name: Detonate Decoy
skills.description: Detonate your decoys instantly.

skills.name: Detonating Arrow
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Fires an arrow that embeds itself in a target then explodes after 0.6 seconds.
skills.altText: Added bow damage applies to the arrow at 125% effectiveness and to the explosion at 200% effectiveness.

skills.name: Devouring Orb
skills.description:
Creates a devouring orb at the target location for 10 seconds that deals void damage over time to nearby enemies, and casts a void rift whenever something dies nearby, hitting nearby enemies to deal void damage.

Each successive rift has 12% more damage and area of effect, capped at an increase of 120%.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied to the damage over time area at 100% effectiveness per second, and to the Void Rifts at 75% effectiveness.

Devouring orb cannot cast more than one void rift every 0.1 seconds.

skills.name: Dive
skills.description: Dash a short fixed distance in the target direction dealing damage to all enemies in your path.
skills.altText:
Dive's cooldown does not recover while you are using it.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

skills.name: Dive Bomb
skills.description: Your {Falcon} ascends high into the sky then dive bombs the target location at high speed, dealing a high amount of physical damage to enemies in the area.
skills.altText:
Your falcon's added damage applies at 500% effectiveness.
If Dive Bomb is interrupted before impact, 70% of the cooldown and mana cost are recovered.

skills.name: Drain Life
skills.description: Channelled spell that targets up to 3 enemies around the target location, dealing necrotic damage over time and leeching 30% of that damage back as health.
skills.altText: Added spell damage applies at 360% effectiveness per second.

skills.name: Dread Shade
skills.description: Your minion's health is drained for 3% of its max health per second for each second the shade has been active, but it and your minions around it deal +10 necrotic damage with spells and attacks and have 50% increased necrotic damage.
skills.altText:
Each minion only benefits from one Dread Shade aura. Max 4 active shades.

Your maximum number of shades is shared with Infernal Shade.

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description: Slam the ground with your weapon damaging enemies in a large area and creating 2 to 4 aftershocks nearby.
skills.altText: Added melee damage applies at 700% effectiveness.

skills.name: Entangling Roots
skills.description:
Call forth a wave of roots that grows outwards in a wide cone in front of you. The wave deals physical damage and roots enemies it hits for 1.5 seconds. Rooted enemies take physical damage over time until they are freed.

Added spell damage applies at 100% to the initial hit and 200% per second to the damage over time.

skills.name: Erasing Strike
skills.description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in a large area in front of you. Enemies killed by the hit are erased from existence, replaced by void rifts.
skills.altText: Added melee damage has 600% effectiveness on the initial hit, but none on the void rifts, which are void spells.

skills.name: Eterra's Blessing
skills.description: The nearest allied target is healed for 100 health. If the target is one of your minions then the healing is tripled and the minion is energised for 4 seconds, increasing its size by 20% and its damage by 100%.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Evade
skills.description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

skills.name: Explosive Trap
skills.description:
Throws a trap that explodes when triggered, dealing throwing fire damage. Traps take 0.4 seconds to arm and explode when enemies walk over them or after 30s. 

You can have a maximum of 6 active traps at a time.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 300% effectiveness to the explosion.

skills.name: Falcon Strikes
skills.description: Your Falcon rapidly strike enemies within the target area.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

skills.name: Falconry
skills.description:
Passive:
Summons a {Falcon} that fights with you.

Active:
{Falcon Strikes}: The {Falcon} rapidly hits many enemies in the target area.
skills.lore: The Dune Falcon is one of the most deadly hunters in all of Eterra. What it lacks in size it makes up in speed, precision, and intelligence. Fierce and independent, the Dune Falcon is known to maim those who attempt to train it. Only those it recognizes as an equal can hope to gain its trust and be accepted as a hunting partner.
skills.altText: The Falcon cannot take damage and is untargetable by enemies. Press {A} to give your minions an attack command.

skills.name: Flay
skills.description:
Spirit Step up to 3 meters towards an enemy if not within range, then perform a narrow rending slash.
Each enemy killed by the melee attack will release a Blood Eruption, a spell dealing physical damage in an area.
Enemies can be hit by both Flay and all Blood Eruptions that occur.
skills.altText:
The melee attack has 200% effectiveness of added melee damage.
The Blood Eruption has 200% effectiveness of added spell damage.

skills.name: Flurry
skills.description: A bow or melee attack that performs 3 rapid strikes. The last strike can be cancelled by moving.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies at 80% effectiveness to each strike and each strike has a 40% reduced chance to apply ailments on hit.

Increased Area for Area skills stats only affect the melee version of Flurry.

skills.name: Forge Strike
skills.description:
A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you.

25% chance on hit to summon a Forged Weapon which lasts for 20 seconds and is affected by the stats and attack rate of your weapon. You can control up to 6 Forged Weapons at once.
skills.altText: Added melee damage applies at 600% effectiveness.

skills.name: Frigid Tempest
skills.description: Conjures a spear of frost that pierces enemies.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.

skills.name: Fury Leap
skills.description: Leap to the target location, dealing damage to nearby enemies when you hit the ground.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Gathering Storm
skills.description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

skills.name: Gathering Storm
skills.description: Strike at your enemy with a mighty lightning powered storm. When you use Gathering Storm and hit at least one enemy, you gain a {Storm Stack}. Every second you expend a Storm Stack to cause a {Storm Bolt} to strike a nearby enemy. This interval is reduced by 2% for every stack you currently have.
skills.altText:
The attack deals melee lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness, and the {Storm Bolt} deals spell lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness.

Increased area for area skills stats apply to the melee attack and to the damage area of the {Storm Bolt}, but not to the area in which enemies are targeted by {Storm Bolts}.

skills.name: Gathering Storm
skills.description: Strike at your enemy with a mighty lightning powered storm. When you use Gathering Storm and hit at least one enemy, you gain a {Storm Stack}. Every second you expend a Storm Stack to cause a {Storm Bolt} to strike a nearby enemy. This interval is reduced by 2% for every stack you currently have.
skills.altText:
The attack deals melee lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness, and the {Storm Bolt} deals spell lightning damage with added damage applying at 100% effectiveness.

Increased area for area skills stats apply to the melee attack and to the damage area of the {Storm Bolt}, but not to the area in which enemies are targeted by {Storm Bolts}.

skills.name: Ghostflame
skills.description: Channel to releases a continuous jet of horrid flames in front of you dealing fire and necrotic damage over time.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 600% effectiveness each second. Damage reduces while rotating.

skills.name: Hail of Arrows
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Launch a hail of arrows into the sky that rain down on the target location over 3.5 seconds.
skills.altText: Added bow damage is applied at 325% effectiveness per second.

skills.name: Hammer Throw
skills.description:
Throws a hammer that returns to you after a short delay.

Added Throwing Damage is applied to each hit at 110% effectiveness.
skills.altText: This is a throwing attack that scales with throwing attack damage and throwing attack speed. It is not a melee attack or spell.

skills.name: Harvest
skills.description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you, dealing double damage to those that are Cursed.
skills.altText: Unaffected by weapon range. Added damage applies at 70% effectiveness. Common curses include Marked for Death, Bone Curse and Spirit Plague.

skills.name: Healing Hands
skills.description: Heals all allies in a target area for 50 health and applies a lingering warmth which heals 80 health over the next 3 seconds. The lingering warmth cannot stack on the same target.

skills.name: Heartseeker
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

Shoot an arrow that seeks the heart of a nearby target, passing harmlessly through other enemies. Whenever it hits its target it has a chance to continue through it and {Recurve} to strike it again. 

Subsequent {Recurve} chance is multiplied by 0.8 each time the arrow {Recurves}. If the target dies, it will choose a new target.
skills.altText:
Base recurve chance is 100%.

Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Holy Aura
skills.description: You and nearby allies passively gain 30% increased damage and +15% additional elemental resistance. Activating Holy Aura doubles the stat bonuses for 4 seconds.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Human Form
skills.description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

skills.name: Hungering Souls
skills.description:
Calls forth five hungering souls that seeks out enemies, on hit they deal necrotic damage and then possesses the target.

Possessed enemies take necrotic damage over time for 1.5 seconds. Enemies cannot be possessed by multiple souls at once.
skills.altText:
Possess's damage counts as spell damage and it is affected by modifiers to base spell damage.

Added spell damage applies to the initial hit at 45% effectiveness and to possess at 75% effectiveness over its full duration.

skills.name: Infernal Shade
skills.description: Target enemy and all nearby enemies take fire damage per second. Each enemy can only have one Infernal Shade attached at a time. Expires after 5 seconds. Max 4 active shades.
skills.altText:
Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness each second.

Your maximum number of shades is shared with Dread Shade.

skills.name: Javelin
skills.description:
Hurl a javelin that pierces through every enemy in its path.

If you have a spear equipped added melee damage from the spear applies to Javelin as added throwing damage at 50% of its normal value. Added melee damage from other sources has no effect.

Added throwing damage applies at 250% effectiveness.
skills.altText:
This is a throwing attack that scales with throwing attack damage and throwing attack speed.

The 250% added throwing damage effectiveness applies to all added throwing damage, including added throwing damage that was converted from your spear's added melee damage. So, equipping a spear with +100 Melee Damage causes Javelin to deal 125 additional damage.

skills.name: Judgement
skills.description:
A powerful melee attack that leaves an area of {Consecrated Ground} for 4 seconds.

Allies on the {Consecrated Ground} are healed for 50 health each second.

Enemies on Consecrate Ground take fire damage over time that scales with spell damage. Consecrate Ground gains 1 spell damage per 5% increased healing effectiveness.
skills.altText:
Added melee damage applies to the attack at 350% effectiveness.

Added spell damage applies to Consecrated Ground at 375% effectiveness per second.

The melee attack's damage does not scale with spell damage and Consecrated Ground's damage does not scale with melee damage.

skills.name: Lethal Mirage
skills.description: Become immune for a duration and rapidly strike nearby targets with 6 mirages.
skills.altText:
Mirages' added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Increased Area for Area Skills stats apply to the attacks of individual mirages, but not to the maximum range at which mirages can be created.

skills.name: Lunge
skills.description: Dash to a nearby enemy and strike it with your weapon. Cannot be used without a target. Costs more mana the further away the target is.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Maelstrom
skills.description:
Surrounds you with a freezing Maelstrom that deals cold damage over time to nearby enemies.

Can be cast repeatedly to create multiple maelstroms at once. Each Maelstrom lasts 7 seconds.
skills.altText:
Each Maelstrom has a base freeze rate per second of 24.

Added spell damage applies to each Maelstrom at 80% effectiveness per second.

skills.name: Manifest Armor
skills.description:
Manifests an animated set of heavy armor, which attacks slowly.

Stats granted by your body armor, helmet, gloves and boots also apply to your Manifest Armor.
skills.altText:
Manifested Armors have 400 base health.

Manifest Armor has a 30% chance to retaliate with {Forge Nova} when hit. This effect deals 40 spell fire damage with added damage applying at 200% effectiveness, applies fire resistance shred to enemies hit and has a 2 second cooldown.

skills.name: Marrow Shards
skills.description: Fires sharpened bones from your body. The bones pierce through enemies inflicting physical damage. Instead of mana, this spell costs 9% of your current health.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 125% effectiveness.

skills.name: Maul
skills.description: Jump forward a short distance and slam into the ground dealing damage to nearby enemies.
skills.altText: Added melee damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Multishot
skills.description:
Requires a bow.

A bow attack that fires a cone of 5 arrows in the target direction. Aiming the cursor further from your character reduces the spread.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 120% effectiveness

skills.name: Multistrike
skills.description:
A melee attack that grants a stack of {Armament} if you hit at least one enemy.

Armament stacks up to 2 times and each stack lasts 3 seconds.

Each stack of {Armament} causes an additional sword to strike a nearby enemy when you use Multistrike.
skills.altText:
Additional swords cannot target the enemy you initially hit or enemies targeted by other swords.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Net
skills.description: Leaps backwards and throws a net which snares enemies and deals physical damage. Netted bosses and rare enemies have 35% less movement speed, and other enemies are immobilized.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.
Nets last 3-5 seconds at random on each enemy.

skills.name: Profane Veil
skills.description:
Channel to conceal yourself within a Profane Veil that deals necrotic damage over time to enemies around you. While concealed you dodge every Hit, but you can still take damage from damage over time effects, such as ailments, and you move more slowly.

Last for up to 2 seconds (also ends when you release the key). Cooldown does not recover during use.
skills.altText:
You have 40% less movement speed while channeling (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Added spell damage applies at 200% effectiveness per second.

skills.name: Puncture
skills.description: An extended melee stab or piercing bow attack that has a 30% chance to inflict bleed on hit. Bleeds inflicted by puncture have 30% increased duration.
skills.altText:
When using a bow, Puncture deals 5% less damage to each subsequent enemy hit up to 20% less damage.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Rampage
skills.description:
The companion ability of your Primal Raptor.

Sends your Raptor into a rampage. Your raptor gains 40% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and 40% increased attack speed, cast speed, movement speed, and size for 4 seconds
skills.altText: Scales with your Raptor's stats rather than yours

skills.name: Rampage
skills.description: Charge towards a target location dealing damage and knocking back enemies in your path.
skills.altText: Rampage's cooldown does not recover while you are using it.

skills.name: Reap
skills.description: Dash a short distance in the target direction using your scythes to strike all enemies in your path. Restores 15 health for each enemy hit.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Rebuke
skills.description:
Hold ability key to channel for up to 2 seconds. You take 80% less damage while channelling.

When you stop channelling the barrier breaks dealing physical damage to all nearby enemies. This deals 20 additional physical damage for each hit you received while channelling.
skills.altText:
You cannot be stunned while channelling.

Added spell damage is applied at 200% effectiveness.

skills.name: Ring Of Shields
skills.description:
Manifests a ring of shields around you.

Each shield has 75 base health and lasts up to 10 seconds. Shields draw enemy aggression and block projectiles.

Stats on your equipped shield also apply to the shields created by Ring of Shields

skills.name: Rip Blood
skills.description: Rips blood out of a target enemy dealing physical damage to it. An orb of the blood is drawn back to you, restoring 5 health when it reaches you.
skills.altText:
Affected by increases to Healing Effectiveness.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Rive
skills.description: A combo of three melee attacks. Every third consecutive attack with Rive slashes in a full circle around the character, dealing double damage.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 3 seconds without using Rive.

Added melee damage applies to the first two hits at 125% effectiveness and to the third hit at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Rive
skills.description: A combo of three melee attacks. Every third consecutive attack with Rive slashes in a full circle around the character, dealing double damage.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 3 seconds without using Rive.

Added melee damage applies to the first two hits at 125% effectiveness and to the third hit at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Rive
skills.description: A combo of three melee attacks. Every third consecutive attack with Rive slashes in a full circle around the character, dealing double damage.
skills.altText:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 3 seconds without using Rive.

Added melee damage applies to the first two hits at 125% effectiveness and to the third hit at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Roar
skills.description:
Unleash a thunderous roar which knocks enemies back and stuns them for 1.5 seconds. Rares and bosses are stunned for half as long.. All effects from your Warcry Skill Tree are applied to Roar.

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun (or freeze if Warcry is converted to cold) an enemy, including with Roar itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.

skills.name: Sacrifice
skills.description: Rips apart an allied minion, dealing physical damage to enemies around it.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness.

skills.name: Serpent Strike
skills.description:
Requires a spear.

A melee attack with 140% poison chance.

Poisons inflicted by serpent strike last 40% longer.
skills.altText:
Poison chance above 100% gives a chance to apply additional stacks of poison (this mechanic applies to all hits, not just Serpent Strike).

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Shadow Cascade
skills.description:
Requires dual wielding.

A circular attack that's also used by your shadow clones.
skills.altText: Added damages is applied at 200% effectiveness. Base critical strike chance is 10%, instead of the normal 5%.

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description:
Requires a shield.

A melee directional attack that stuns enemies for 1 second. 100% increased stun duration against non-boss enemies.

1.5% more damage per 1% block chance (up to 150%, multiplicative with other modifiers).

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun an enemy, including with Shield Bash itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.
skills.altText:
Increased attack speed has no effect for Shield Bash.

Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

skills.name: Shield Rush
skills.description:
Requires a shield.

Charge through enemies in the target direction until you release the ability key. You hit enemies in your path and in a wider area at the end of the movement. You do not regenerate mana while rushing.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Shield Throw
skills.description:
Throws a shield at a target enemy. The shield ricochets to up to 2 additional targets before returning to you.

You cannot throw a new shield until the current shield has returned to you.
skills.altText:
The shield hits all enemies in its path, even those it does not ricochet from.

Added throwing attack damage is applied at 225% effectiveness.

skills.name: Shift
skills.description: Dash a short fixed distance in the target direction.
skills.altText: Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Shocking Impact
skills.description: Call a meteor from the sky that deals a large amount of damage upon landing. Added damage is applied at five times its normal value.

skills.name: Shurikens
skills.description: Throw 3 shurikens in a cone.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

skills.name: Smelter's Wrath
skills.description:
Channel to charge a powerful frontal cone attack, dealing fire and physical damage to all enemies hit. Charging for longer increases its range and power. 2 second maximum charge time.

Your armor is doubled while channelling Smelter's Wrath.
skills.altText:
Deals up to 100% more damage at maximum charge.

Added damage is applied at 600% effectiveness.

Increased Area for Area Skills stats increase Smelter's Wrath's charge speed instead of its area.

skills.name: Smite
skills.description:
Smites a target enemy with a bolt of holy fire that descends from the sky, healing allies around the target for 60 health. If you are in the area you are also healed.

Cannot be used without a target.
skills.altText: Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness

skills.name: Smoke Bomb
skills.description: Drop a Smoke Bomb at your feet that blinds enemies and grants you haste while you remain inside it. The Smoke Bomb grows in size over its duration. Lasts 4 seconds.
skills.altText: You can have a maximum of 2 smoke bombs active at once.

skills.name: Soul Feast
skills.description:
Feasts on the souls of {Cursed} enemies, dealing necrotic damage to them, and drawing fragments of their souls back to you. The soul fragments each grant 3 ward when they reach you.

Feasts on up to 13 enemies, prioritising those closest to you.
skills.altText: Added spell damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

skills.name: Spirit Plague
skills.description: Curses a target with a powerful necrotic damage over time effect which lasts 3 seconds. Spreads to a single nearby target on target death.
skills.altText: Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.

skills.name: Spirit Thorns
skills.description: Releases a burst of thorns towards enemies in the target direction. Thorns deal physical damage on hit and multiple thorns can hit the same target.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

skills.name: Spriggan Form
skills.description:
Transform into a forest spriggan, increasing your spell casting capabilities, and gaining 4 new abilities.

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in spriggan form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
skills.altText:
The four new abilities are: Spirit Thorns, Thorn Shield, Summon Vine and Summon Healing Totem.

While in spriggan form you have 50% increased spell damage and +300 armor.

skills.name: Summon Bear
skills.description:
Summons a primal bear that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The bear counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: Primals bears have 300 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Bone Golem
skills.description: Summons a bone golem, which attacks slowly, but has a 15% chance to retaliate with Bone Shatter when hit.
skills.altText: Bone golems have 400 base health.

skills.name: Summon Cryomancer
skills.description: Summons a skeleton mage to assist you. You are limited to 2 mages at a time.
skills.altText:
Skeleton mages have 100 base health. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

You will always summon the skeleton type you have the fewest of.

skills.name: Summon Death Knight
skills.description: Summons a Skeleton Death Knight to assist you.
skills.altText: Skeleton Death Knights have 200 base health and 15% base critical strike chance. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

skills.name: Summon Forged Weapon
skills.description:
Summons a Forged Weapon which lasts for 20 seconds and is affected by the stats and attack rate of your weapon. You can control up to 6 Forged Weapons at once.

Forged Weapons have 220 based health.
skills.altText: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

skills.name: Summon Frenzy Totem
skills.description: Summons a totem that grants Frenzy to all nearby allies. Frenzy increases attack and cast speed by 20%.
skills.altText: Frenzy totems have 120 base health and last 6 seconds.

skills.name: Summon Healing Totem
skills.description: Summons a totem that heals nearby allies. Healing totems have 100 base health and last 6 seconds.

skills.name: Summon Hive
skills.description:
Summons a Hive that releases Locusts while enemies are nearby. You can have a maximum of three Hives by default and each Hive contains 12 Locusts.

You are limited to 12 active Locusts and each Locust lasts up to 12 seconds.
skills.altText: The rate at which it summons Locusts scales with minion cast speed. Locusts scale with your minion stats.

skills.name: Summon Pyromancer
skills.description: Summons a skeleton mage to assist you. You are limited to 2 mages at a time.
skills.altText:
Skeleton mages have 100 base health. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

You will always summon the skeleton type you have the fewest of.

skills.name: Summon Raptor
skills.description:
Summons a primal raptor that ferociously attacks your enemies. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The raptor counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The raptor has 240 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Sabertooth
skills.description:
Summons a primal sabertooth cat that leaps into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The sabertooth cat counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The sabertooth has 240 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Scorpion
skills.description:
Summons a scorpion that follows you into combat. Its attacks with its tails inflict a long lasting poison. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The scorpion counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The scorpion has 400 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Skeletal Mage
skills.description:
Summons a Skeletal Mage to assist you. You are limited to 2 Skeletal Mages at a time.
Skeletal Mages cast Dread Bolt, which has 150% added damage effectiveness and has a 50% chance to apply Damned on hit.
skills.altText:
Skeletal Mages have 100 base health.

You will always summon the Skeletal Mage type you have the fewest of.

skills.name: Summon Skeleton
skills.description: Summons a skeleton warrior or skeleton archer to guard you. You are limited to 3 skeletons at a time.
skills.altText:
Skeletons have 100 base health.

You will always summon the skeleton type you have the fewest of.

Increased Area for Minion Area Skills stats affect summoned skeletons' melee attacks.

skills.name: Summon Skeleton Rogue
skills.description: Summon a primal wolf to guard you and attack your enemies

skills.name: Summon Spriggan
skills.description:
Summon a spriggan that casts spells to attack your enemies and has a passive Healing Aura that restores 10 health per second. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The spriggan counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The spriggan has 160 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Squirrel
skills.description:
Summons a primal wolf that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The wolf counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The Wolf has 160 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

skills.name: Summon Storm Crows
skills.description:
Summons Storm Crows up to your companion limit. The Storm Crow casts spells from a distance. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The Storm Crow counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The crow has 200 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Storm Totem
skills.description:
Summons a totem that casts lightning storms around nearby enemies.

Storm totems last 8 seconds, and you cannot control more than 1 at once.
skills.altText: Storm totems have 120 base health

skills.name: Summon Thorn Totem
skills.description: Summons a totem that fires thorns at nearby enemies. You can have a maximum of two thorn totems by default.
skills.altText:
Totems scale with your minion or totem stats, not your stats.
Added minion spell damage applies at 75% effectiveness for the Thorns fired by the Thorn Totem.

Thorn totems have 120 base health and last 6 seconds by default.

skills.name: Summon Vine
skills.description:
Summons 1 poisonous vine.

Vines are melee minions that inflict poison on hit. You can have up to 12 vines.

skills.name: Summon Vines
skills.description:
Summon 3 poisonous vines for 8 seconds.

Each vine has 50 base health.

skills.name: Summon Volatile Zombie
skills.description: Summons a Volatile Zombie which trudges towards the nearest enemy. When it reaches an enemy or dies, it explodes dealing physical and fire damage to surrounding enemies.
skills.altText:
You are limited to 6 active zombies. Summoning more will cause older ones to explode.

Volatile Zombies' have 200 base health and their health decays at an accelerating rate.

skills.name: Summon Wolf
skills.description:
Summons a primal wolf that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

While you have your maximum number of wolves, the ability is replaced with {Howl}.

The wolf counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
skills.altText: The Wolf has 220 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

skills.name: Summon Wraith
skills.description: Summons a wraith that rapidly fades from this world, but will seek and attack your foes while it remains.
skills.altText:
You are limited to 6 active wraiths.

Wraiths have 60 base health.

skills.name: Swarm Strike
skills.description: A circular attack which deals damage to all nearby enemies, then gathers nearby locusts to create a Swarm around you which deals damage over time to nearby enemies.
skills.altText:
For each Locust consumed the Swarm gains +15 melee physical, +15 melee poison damage, 15% increased duration, and 15% increased area.

Added melee damage applies at 350% effectiveness to the initial hit and at 300% per second to the Swarm.

skills.name: Swarmblade Form
skills.description:
Transform into an agile Swarmblade, increasing your melee capabilities, and gaining 4 new abilities.

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in swarmblade form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
skills.altText:
The four new abilities are: Armblade Slashes, Swarm Strike, Dash and Summon Hive.

While in Swarmblade Form you have 10% increased melee attack speed and movement speed.

skills.name: Swipe
skills.description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Unaffected by weapon range.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Symbols of Hope
skills.description:
Every 2 seconds, summons a symbol that orbits you, causing you and your allies' attacks and spells to deal 3 additional fire damage and increasing health regeneration by 20%.

Activate to consume the symbols, granting 100 ward and 5% less damage taken per symbol for 3 seconds.

You can have up to 3 symbols at a time.

skills.name: Synchronized Strike
skills.description:
Requires a melee weapon.

Jump forward and strike in an area in front of you while shadows appear and simultaneously strike on either side of you.

skills.name: Teleport
skills.description: Teleport to target location.

skills.name: Teleport
skills.description: Teleport to target location.

skills.name: Tempest Strike
skills.description:
A melee combo attack that cycles through a cold strike, a physical strike, and a lightning strike that trigger elemental {Tempest} spells of the same damage type if the strikes hit at least one enemy.

Cold strike: Triggers a {Frigid Tempest}, which is a cold projectile that pierces through enemies.
Physical strike: Triggers a {Wind Tempest}, which is a small twister that lasts a short duration dealing physical damage per over time.
Lightning strike: Triggers a {Thunder Tempest}, which is an expanding storm of lightning bolts.
skills.altText:
Added damage for the melee strikes apply at 100% effectiveness.

{Frigid Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.
{Wind Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.
{Thunder Tempest}: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

skills.name: Thorn Shield
skills.description: Form a protective barrier of thorns around yourself or an ally that grants 30 armor and reflects 50 damage to attackers. When the shield expires, a burst of thorns shoots out and damages all nearby enemies.

skills.name: Tornado
skills.description: Conjures a tornado that moves at random, pulling in nearby enemies and dealing physical damage to them.
skills.altText: Added damage applies to the damage over time at 125% effectiveness per second.

skills.name: Transplant
skills.description:
Creates a new body for you at the target location, then detonates your old body to deal physical damage to enemies around it.

Instead of mana, this spell costs 13% of your current health.
skills.altText:
Added damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

skills.name: Umbral Blades
skills.description:
A combo ability that throws 2 blades, then 4 blades, then recalls all blades in the ground back to you, hitting enemies along the way.

An enemy can be hit by multiple blades from the same throw and by multiple blades from the recall.

Shadows using Umbral Blades always throw a single Shadow Blade that deals 300% more damage and has 100% increased radius.

Only the first part of the combo costs mana.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

Umbral Blades can persist in the ground for up to 6 seconds.

skills.name: Umbral Blades
skills.description: Recall all Umbral Blades to you, hitting enemies along the way.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

skills.name: Upheaval
skills.description: Sunders the ground in a line in front of you, dealing damage to enemies along the path.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

skills.name: Vengeance
skills.description:
A melee attack that also prepares you to riposte incoming hits.

If vengeance successfully hits an enemy and you take a hit in the next 2 seconds you will riposte, taking 25% less damage and striking at a nearby enemy.
skills.altText: Added damage is applied at 125% effectiveness to the initial hit and 150% effectiveness to the riposte.

skills.name: Void Cleave
skills.description:
Requires a 2-handed sword or axe.

A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Can be echoed by Void Knights. Unaffected by weapon range.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 400% effectiveness.

skills.name: Volatile Reversal
skills.description: A combo ability that jumps forwards in time to a target location and performs a melee attack on arrival. Recast within 3 seconds to jump backwards in time to your original location and perform a melee attack on arrival.
skills.altText:
Added damage applies to the melee attacks at 200% effectiveness.

Volatile Reversal's cooldown continues recovering while the recast is available.

skills.name: Wandering Spirits
skills.description:
Reveals wandering spirits around you for 6 seconds. The spirits wander at random dealing necrotic damage over time to enemies they pass through.

4 spirits are revealed immediately after casting the skill and 17 more are revealed over the next 6 seconds.

The spirits individually last up to 4 seconds, but all remaining spirits fade once the reveal duration ends.
skills.altText:
Added spell damage applies to each spirit's damage at 200% effectiveness per second.

Increased Area stats affect the area of effect of each individual spirit, but not the area in which spirits are revealed.

skills.name: Warcry
skills.description:
Unleash a mighty roar that knocks back nearby enemies and stuns them for 1.5 seconds. Rares and bosses are stunned for half as long.

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun (or freeze if Warcry is converted to cold) an enemy, including with Warcry itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.

skills.name: Warpath
skills.description: Spin towards the mouse while you hold down the ability key, striking nearby enemies as you move.
skills.altText:
You have 20% less movement speed while spinning (multiplicative with other modifiers). Hits at twice your attack rate, but added damage applies at 60% effectiveness and there is a 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit. 

You cannot be stunned while spinning.

Not affected by weapon range.

skills.name: Wave of Death
skills.description: Releases a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been actve and your current percent missing health.
skills.altText: Added damage applies at 500% effectiveness.

skills.name: Werebear Form
skills.description:
Transform into a ferocious werebear, increasing your physical capabilities and gaining 4 new abilities. 

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in werebear form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
skills.altText:
The four new abilities are: Rampage, Swipe, Maul and Roar. Swipe and Roar inherit all bonuses from your Swipe and Warcry skill trees.

While in bear form you have 50% increased melee damage and 15% increased health.
